name: gsdd-cli
description: Workspine — a repo-native delivery spine for long-horizon AI-assisted work, with directly validated support for Claude Code, Codex CLI, and OpenCode, published as gsdd-cli.

scripts.test:gsdd: node tests/gsdd.init.test.cjs && node tests/gsdd.models.test.cjs && node tests/gsdd.consumer-ceremony.test.cjs && node tests/gsdd.manifest.test.cjs && node tests/gsdd.plan.adapters.test.cjs && node tests/gsdd.audit-milestone.test.cjs && node tests/gsdd.invariants.test.cjs && node tests/gsdd.guards.test.cjs && node tests/gsdd.health.test.cjs && node tests/gsdd.scenarios.test.cjs && node tests/gsdd.cross-runtime.test.cjs && node tests/phase.test.cjs && node tests/session-fingerprint.test.cjs
scripts.prepublishOnly: node -e "const ok=process.env.GITHUB_ACTIONS==='true'&&process.env.GITHUB_REF_NAME==='main'&&process.env.GITHUB_WORKFLOW==='Release'; if(!ok){console.error('Refusing to publish gsdd-cli outside the GitHub Actions Release workflow on main.'); process.exit(1)}"

author: PatrickSys
